It’s interesting that our main competitor China is moving in the opposite direction: they are becoming an even more homogenous and high trust society. 

They only import the absolute best and brightest, including some Americans, who now prefer their society over our own.

parentTweet.content:

That means: cheating and scamming, normalization of nepotism, and the eventual total erosion of what was once a high trust society.
